stories.title: Warren Freezes New Data Centers After Storms Down 60+ Power Lines
stories.dek: Council approved the temporary moratorium after July storms exposed the strain on Warren's aging grid. City attorneys will now draft the pause while zoning rules are revised.

stories.title: Saline Township Locals Resist $16B Stargate Data Center Over Water and Farmland
stories.dek: Residents of the 2,400-person farming community say the project already under construction will drain water supplies, raise utility costs and erase rural character.

stories.title: Oracle wins unlimited tax break on $43B Ann Arbor-area campus
stories.dek: Saline Township dropped its $4.8B cap on incentives for the Oracle-OpenAI project. Residents now face decades of lost property-tax revenue with no upper limit on the deal. The reversal hands the company a blank check paid for by local taxpayers.
stories.source_title: Township changes course, nixing cap on tax break for $43B Oracle, OpenAI data center near Ann Arbor - MLive.com

stories.title: Township removes cap on Oracle property tax exemption, risking school and road funding
stories.dek: Saline Township lifted the dollar cap on a proposed tax abatement for Oracle's massive data-center project. Residents could see decades of lost property-tax revenue that would otherwise fund schools and roads. The change shifts the financial stakes for Washtenaw County taxpayers.
stories.source_title: Saline Township Reverses $4.8 Billion Limit on Oracle Tax Break - The Sun Times News

stories.title: NY moratorium threatens Genesee County's STAMP data-center plans
stories.dek: New York's pause on large data centers could block or delay the STAMP project that Genesee County has counted on for jobs and tax base growth. Local officials are watching whether the site loses its competitive edge to other states. The outcome affects hundreds of planned construction and operations jobs.
stories.source_title: Hochul data center moratorium could affect Genesee Co. STAMP project - AOL.com

stories.title: Hagar Township bans new data centers for at least a year
stories.dek: Supervisors in Hagar Township approved a one-year moratorium on data-center proposals. The move gives residents time to study noise, water use, and power impacts before any project advances. Nearby property owners now have a temporary shield from large-scale development.
stories.source_title: Hagar Township approves data center moratorium - WSJM

stories.title: Warren eyes 6-month data center ban to study grid strain
stories.dek: Macomb County officials are weighing a temporary halt on new data centers while they assess power and water demands. Residents could face higher utility bills if large facilities come online without new safeguards. The council discussion signals growing local pushback against rapid buildouts.
stories.source_title: Warren council could consider a temporary data center moratorium - AOL.com

stories.title: State senator pushes data-center guardrails after earlier defeats
stories.dek: Sen. Andrews is reviving legislation that would force operators to pay for grid upgrades and disclose water use. The bill would apply statewide and limit local tax breaks. Ratepayers in every county would see the cost protections if it passes.
stories.source_title: Andrews hopes data center guardrail legislation can advance, despite setbacks - News/Talk/Sports 94.9 WSJM

stories.title: Monroe County halts new data centers for now
stories.dek: Monroe County commissioners voted to pause all data-center proposals. Residents near potential sites worry about sudden spikes in power bills and water use. The temporary ban gives local officials time to study impacts before any projects advance.
stories.source_title: County approves data center pause - The Monroe Times

stories.title: Hyperscale Data faces questions on noise and power at council meeting
stories.dek: Company officials answered resident concerns about noise and electricity use at a city council session. Neighbors in the Herald Palladium coverage area pressed for details on backup generators and cooling systems. The session gave the public its first direct look at the project's local footprint.
stories.source_title: Hyperscale Data Center addresses community concerns at city council meeting - The Herald Palladium

stories.title: Lake Township blocks data centers for six months
stories.dek: Lake Township trustees approved a half-year moratorium on data-center applications. The move stops any new projects while the township writes rules on noise, power demand and water use. Neighbors say the pause prevents rushed decisions that could affect their property values and daily life.
stories.source_title: Lake Township passes six-month moratorium on data centers - Huron Daily Tribune

national.title: Data centers advance rapidly as regulators scramble for rules
national.dek: Across the U.S., officials race to impose guardrails on power-hungry facilities while communities push back on incentives and impacts.
